title: Base Number Operations
desc: Learn how to do arithmetical operations in a different base than 10. Use the amazing Vedic Method instead!. S01 E05.

title: Divisibility
desc: Do you know the divisibility rules for prime numbers? This episode will help you get the divisibility rule for any number be it prime or composite. Try it!. S01 E17.

title: Auxiliary Fractions
desc: The beauty of the vedic sutras cannot be more displayed by any other episode other than the auxiliary fraction episode. Learn how to solve 1/19 and other similar fractions to over 20 decimal. S01 E02.
